_notes: Demo login accounts. Each entry maps an email+password to a roleId defined in roles.json. For a new customer replace email domains and optionally the password. roleId must match an id in roles.json. All credentials share the same password by default for demo convenience.
_security_note: These are demo credentials for a simulated login screen. They are stored in the browser and sent nowhere. Do not use real customer credentials.

credentials.label: L2/L3 Engineer
credentials.hint: Incidents, Service Map, Requests, MIM, AI Assistant

credentials.label: Rapid Response SRE Team
credentials.hint: Full access — all pages including Workflows, Agents & KB, Reports
